name: 文件系统健康检查
name_en: File system health check and diagnostics

observable_attributes.reading_strategy: inspection approach: full scan of every file vs. sampling strategy vs. pattern-based search for issues; focus areas chosen
observable_attributes.directory_style: diagnostic focus: naming conventions vs. directory structure vs. duplicates vs. missing files vs. stale content
observable_attributes.output_structure: report organization: by severity vs. by issue type vs. by file vs. checklist format
observable_attributes.thoroughness: inspection depth: content-level checks vs. metadata/naming only

prompt_zh: 这个文件夹包含一位法律专业人士的工作文件。请对文件系统进行一次全面的健康检查：1. 有没有命名不规范或不一致的文件？2. 有没有疑似重复的文件？3. 有没有放错位置的文件？4. 有没有过期的临时文件？5. 文件之间的引用关系是否完整？写一份 health_check_report.md，按严重程度排列发现的问题，并给出整改建议。
prompt_en: This folder contains a legal professional's work files. Conduct a comprehensive file system health check: 1. Are there files with inconsistent or non-standard naming? 2. Are there suspected duplicate files? 3. Are there misplaced files? 4. Are there expired temporary files? 5. Are cross-file references complete? Write a health_check_report.md listing issues by severity with remediation recommendations.
behavioral_freedom: Inspection scope: every single file vs. sampling approach vs. pattern-based
Focus priority: naming vs. structure vs. duplicates vs. content consistency
Report style: concise checklist vs. detailed narrative with evidence
Whether to actually fix issues or only report them
Whether to check content-level consistency or only metadata/naming
